name: tomato-code-root
description: Root package for managing Zomato Clone services and frontend

scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm run dev:auth" "pnpm run dev:admin" "pnpm run dev:realtime" "pnpm run dev:restaurant" "pnpm run dev:rider" "pnpm run dev:utils" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "pnpm run dev:auth" "pnpm run dev:admin" "pnpm run dev:realtime" "pnpm run dev:restaurant" "pnpm run dev:rider" "pnpm run dev:utils"
